title: aira nutans
intro: Aira nutans, also known as the nodding hair grass or nodding bent, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the Northern Hemisphere and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Aira nutans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
